title: ACES Scenario Pack — Pack Metadata (v0)
description: Manifest metadata for an ACES scenario pack: identity, version, targeted ACES SDL contract version, scenario references, lifecycle state, and declared optional layers. Implements the Minimum Pack Shape in contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md and does not redefine SDL semantics.

version.description: Pack version using SemVer per docs/versioning.md.

sdlContractVersion.description: ACES SDL contract version this pack targets. SDL semantics are owned by ACES core.

lifecycleState.description: Current pack lifecycle state from the contract's ACES-native set.

scenarios.description: One or more SDL scenario references carried by the pack. A pack with no scenarios is not a scenario pack.

sdlRef.description: Reference to the SDL scenario definition carried by the pack.

layers.description: Declared optional layers. Each references a capability and the schema version that owns its detail, so layer schemas can add detail without rewriting this base schema.

name.description: Optional-layer name as declared by the contract.

provided.description: Whether the pack provides this layer.

schemaId.description: Schema id that owns this layer's detail (see schemas/index.json).

schemaVersion.description: Version of the layer schema this pack targets.
